analysis.elliott_wave: Currently in a minor corrective wave, potentially setting up for a larger bullish impulse. Wave count suggests a potential 5-wave impulse forming.
analysis.momentum: Neutral RSI reading suggests a balanced market, but the recent 0.64% price increase indicates a slight uptrend. Further price action will be needed to confirm momentum.
